task_completion.description: Verify that the location is set to Anchorage International Airport (PANC) and the date is set to November 16, 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Stellarium location window showing coordinates near 61.1743° N, 149.9962° W (or Anchorage/PANC) and the date/time window showing 2024-11-16.

task_completion.description: Verify that the atmosphere and ground/landscape are disabled to obtain true geometric altitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium sky view shows a completely black sky (no atmospheric scattering) and no ground/landscape blocking the view below the horizon.

task_completion.description: Verify the capture of the evening civil twilight event where the Sun's altitude crosses -6° 00' descending.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of Stellarium with the Sun selected, showing its altitude (Alt) at exactly or very close to -6°00', with the time around 02:13 UTC.

task_completion.description: Verify the capture of the morning civil twilight event where the Sun's altitude crosses -6° 00' ascending.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of Stellarium with the Sun selected, showing its altitude (Alt) at exactly or very close to -6°00', with the time around 17:18 UTC.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the logbook verification report at /home/ga/Desktop/twilight_log.txt with all required details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of twilight_log.txt, which must include the airport name (Anchorage/PANC), the two UTC times for the twilight events, and a statement confirming the atmosphere and landscape were disabled.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Stellarium GUI to find the astronomical data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the actual Stellarium application interface with the Sun selected and its ephemeris data visible on screen, rather than just a web browser or terminal script.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually captured and saved the screenshots of the events as requested.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visible use of a screenshot tool, Stellarium's built-in screenshot notification, or a file manager showing the saved image files in a directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent didn't just write a logbook with guessed or hardcoded times without performing the visual check.
integrity.visual_evidence: The times written in the logbook must match the times shown in the Stellarium screenshots where the Sun is at -6° altitude.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: Anchorage International Airport (PANC) at 61.1743° N, 149.9962° W. Date: November 16, 2024. The true times for civil twilight (Sun altitude = -6° geometric) in Stellarium are approximately 02:13 UTC for evening (descending) and 17:18 UTC for morning (ascending). The VLM should accept these true times (02:13 UTC and 17:18 UTC) as correct, as they reflect the accurate astronomical data the agent should extract from the software. The logbook must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/twilight_log.txt.
